hypothesis.thesis_statement: In A-shares, higher gross profits / total assets predicts higher cross-sectional forward returns (US predictor 'GP', Novy-Marx 2013, JFE). Test whether this published US anomaly ports to A-shares.
hypothesis.mechanism: OSAP economic category: profitability. Proposed A-share build: income+balance -> 'osap_gp_ashare'. Definition (US): Revenue (sale) - cost of goods solds (cogs), divided by  total assets (at).  Drop if financial.

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: [DRAFT] The US 'GP' effect may not survive A-share microstructure (T+1, limit boards, retail-dominated flow) or may be subsumed by existing qual factors after neutralization.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: [DRAFT] That the US accounting/price construction maps faithfully to Tushare A-share fields without definitional drift.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: [DRAFT] Sealed-OOS rank-ICIR below the committed band, or hard rules failing after realistic costs.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: [DRAFT] Review turnover at the chosen rebalance before committing.

todo_before_registering: Implement factor 'osap_gp_ashare' in factor_library (map US definition -> A-share Tushare/Qlib fields; PIT-safe Ref(...,1)).
CONFIRM not a duplicate of existing catalog factors in category 'qual' (heuristic flag = REVIEW).
SET expected_effect = YOUR A-share prediction (point + CI + horizon). Do NOT copy us_evidence_context_only above.
CONFIRM the OOS window is unburned for this design before registering.
